title: A space before the equal sign in key-value pair may lead to unintended behavior
description: In Dockerfile instructions (ARG, ENV, LABEL), a space before the equal sign in key-value pairs may lead to unintended behavior. The correct format is KEY=VALUE without spaces around the equal sign. A space before '=' may cause the instruction to be interpreted incorrectly.
recommendation: Remove spaces before equal signs in key-value pairs. Use KEY=VALUE format instead of KEY =VALUE.
impact: Potential bug - incorrect variable assignment or label definition

checks.message: Remove space before '=' in key-value pair. Use KEY=VALUE format.
